result.title: How Edison’s Kosmos AI Scientist Does Six Months of Research in One Day with Nemotron
result.description:
Scientific research is slowing under the weight of papers, code, and complex data, so Edison Scientific built Kosmos, an AI scientist on NVIDIA that compresses six months of work into a single day. In this video, see how Kosmos uses NVIDIA GPUs and foundation models to read thousands of papers, run large-scale analyses, and turn evidence into new hypotheses across genetics, neuroscience, and drug discovery.

Discover how NVIDIA Nemotron™ Parse, cuML, and NeMo RL power Kosmos’ literature, analysis, and molecule-design agents—and what this AI stack means for the future of scientific labs.

Learn more: https://developer.nvidia.com/case-studies/scientific-literature-ai-nvidia-nemotron

#AIScientist #AgenticAI #NVIDIAGTC

result.title: Olaf Takes the Stage With Jensen Huang
result.description:
Guess who made a special appearance on stage with NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang at #NVIDIAGTC? Walt Disney Imagineering’s robotic character, ☃️ Olaf, was a delightful surprise at the GTC keynote this afternoon. This duo? What a grand finale. 🎉

NVIDIA and Disney Research are working together to bring this beloved character into the real world using Newton, the open-source physics engine.

result.title: Building Hospital Automation Using NVIDIA Isaac for Healthcare
result.description:
Hospitals today face chronic staff shortages and increasing patient demand. Project Rheo is a blueprint for smart hospital automation, using physical AI and advanced simulation to train robots that can safely work alongside doctors and nurses. Robots are trained in high‑fidelity simulation with NVIDIA Isaac tools before ever touching real patients, improving safety, efficiency, and capacity in smart hospitals

Learn more on our developer blog: https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/using-simulation-to-build-robotic-systems-for-hospital-automation/ and on Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/physical-ai-for-healthcare-robotics

Follow us:
X: https://nvda.ws/4hi2sxB
LinkedIn: https://nvda.ws/4eSlE3B
Subscribe to the NVIDIA AI Healthcare Newsletter: https://nvda.ws/4eS1F54

result.title: How NVIDIA AODT Powers Network Digital Twins
result.description:
With NVIDIA Aerial Omniverse Digital Twin, developers design, validate, and iterate systems in simulation, before they enter the real world.
The platform is modular, designed for an ecosystem, and is already delivering.

Learn more: https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/5-new-digital-twin-products-developers-can-use-to-build-6g-networks/

result.title: The AI Grid: Orchestrating Intelligence Across Distributed Networks
result.description:
For AI to stay responsive and economical at scale, it needs to move closer to where data is created and intelligence is used. That’s where the AI grid comes in: connected, distributed sites operating as a unified, orchestrated computing platform.

With NVIDIA platforms, the network becomes a living AI grid, putting telcos and distributed cloud providers at the heart of how AI is experienced everywhere.

Learn more: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/industries/telecommunications/ai-grid/
